sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀναβλέπω

- Transliteration: Anablepo

- Phonetic: an-ab-lep'-o

- Definition:

1. to look up

2. to recover (lost) sight

- Origin: from G303 and G991

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and G991; to look up; by implication to recover sight: - look (up) see receive sight.
